        self.pipes[0] = Pipe(x=self.spawn_x, gap_y=random.randint(80, 380), gap_h=140)

        self.timers[0] = 0

    def spawn_pipe_1(self):
        self.pipes[1] = Pipe(x=self.spawn_x, gap_y=random.randint(80, 380), gap_h=140)
